hero.title: Innovation Lab
hero.description: Explore interactive demos, experiments, and technical showcases from our engineering team.

hero.title: Innovation Lab
hero.description: Re nyakišiša mellwane ye e šomago ka go AI, automation le ditshepedišo tše di phatlaladitšwego, gomme re fetolela dinyakišišo tše di netefaditšwego go bokgoni bja tšweletšo bjo bo tshephagalago.

researchAreas.title: Mafelo a Dinyakišišo
researchAreas.description: Lefelo le lengwe le le lengwe la nepišo le kopanya dinyakišišo tša nyakišišo le ditsela tša phethagatšo tšeo di diretšwego ditshepedišo tša lefase la mmakgonthe.

detailedFocusBriefs.title: Detailed Focus Briefs
detailedFocusBriefs.description: Dinyakišišo tša nako ye e kgauswi ga bjale di tloga go netefatšo ya boagišani go ya go maano a kabelo.

fromLabToProduction.title: Go tloga ka laboratori go ya go tšweletšo
fromLabToProduction.description: Tlhabollo ka Horizon e lekantšwe ka dipoelo tše di rometšwego, e sego diprotšeke tše di arogantšwego.

roadmap.title: R&D Roadmap
roadmap.description: Kgatelopele ya kgato go tšwa go kago ya bokgoni go ya go tshepedišo ye e fetofetogago, ye e tšwelago pele.

publications.title: Publications & Insights
publications.description: Technical writing and implementation notes from ongoing innovation work.

appliedAi.title: Applied AI Systems
appliedAi.description: Production-focused AI architectures spanning model serving, feature orchestration, and controlled experimentation.

automationFrameworks.title: Automation Frameworks
automationFrameworks.description: Internal automation tooling for deployment safety, incident response, and repeatable engineering workflows.

advancedArchitecture.title: Advanced Architecture Experimentation
advancedArchitecture.description: Research into resilient, distributed architectures optimized for performance, fault tolerance, and scale.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: Bohlale bja go tšea diphetho tša latency ya fase, tshepedišo ya telemetry, le kgokaganyo ya didirišwa tša difofane.

nlp.title: Tshepedišo ya Polelo ya Tlhago
nlp.description: Multilingual understanding pipelines for classification, extraction, translation, and conversational systems.

evolutionaryAlgorithms.title: Evolutionary Algorithms & Optimization
evolutionaryAlgorithms.description: Dinyakišišo le dinyakišišo tšeo di hlohleleditšwego ke kgetho ya tlhago go rarolla ditlhohlo tša boentšeneere bja maemo a godimo.

automationFrameworks.title: Automation Frameworks
automationFrameworks.description: We are building composable workflow frameworks for release orchestration, quality gates, and post-deployment verification to reduce manual friction while improving reliability.

advancedArchitecture.title: Advanced Architecture Experimentation
advancedArchitecture.description: Our architecture experiments focus on service decomposition strategies, cross-region resiliency patterns, and performance envelopes for systems operating under volatile demand.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: We are validating event-streaming and edge inference designs that enable faster local decisions while preserving centralized control, auditability, and model lifecycle governance.

adaptiveCapacityPlanning.title: Peakanyo ya Bokgoni bja Adaptive
adaptiveCapacityPlanning.description: Diprotšeke tša laboratori di tiišetšwa kgahlanong le mešomo ya go itšhireletša gomme tša kopanywa ka maano a go itšhireletša.

operationalIntelligence.title: Operational Intelligence
operationalIntelligence.description: Diphaephe tša NLP di tloga go diteko tše di laolwago go ya go thekgo ya tšweletšo ya mešomo ya go kgetha ka pela le kwešišo ye e kwagalago.

optimizationInDeliverySystems.title: Optimization in Delivery Systems
optimizationInDeliverySystems.description: Mekgwa ya tlhagelelo yeo e lekotšwego ka laporatoring e fetolelwa go dientšene tša go kaonafatša peakanyo le kabelo.

edgeDecisioning.title: Phetho ya Edge
edgeDecisioning.description: IoT le diteko tša inference di tiišetšwa go ditirelo tša latency ya fase ka mapheko a go tshepagala.

now.title: Applied AI Foundations
now.description: Expand reusable model-serving templates, evaluation suites, and observability standards across product teams.

next.title: Autonomous Engineering Workflows
next.description: Tšhomišo ya metšhene yeo e fokotšago kotsi ya go romelwa le go fokotša diphetolo tša dikepe.

twelveToEighteenMonths.title: Bohlale bja Edge-Native
twelveToEighteenMonths.description: Scale hybrid cloud-edge architectures for near real-time inference in latency-sensitive environments.

longHorizon.title: Continuous Optimization Systems
longHorizon.description: Kopanya diteko, go lekola le go kaonafatša gore ditshepedišo di kgone go fetoga ka polokego ge maemo a fetoga.

aiReliability.title: Engineering AI Systems That Stay Reliable in Production
aiReliability.summary: A practical perspective on balancing experimentation velocity with production governance.

distributedArchitecturePatterns.title: Distributed Architecture Patterns for High-Growth Platforms
distributedArchitecturePatterns.summary: Field notes from architecture trials focused on performance, resiliency, and operational simplicity.

roadmappingAppliedRd.title: Roadmapping Applied R&D for Business Results
roadmappingAppliedRd.summary: How we structure innovation initiatives so discoveries move from prototype to measurable value.

cta.title: Build with Horizon Innovation Lab
cta.description: Dirišana le rena go tiišetša dikgopolo tše di nago le maikemišetšo ka pela le go sepediša dikgopolo tše di netefaditšwego go tshepedišo ya tšweletšo ye e bolokegilego, ye e kgonagalago.

hero.title: Applied AI Systems
hero.description: Kakaretšo ye e šomago ya ka moo Horizon e hlamago ka gona, e šomišago le go šomiša ditshepedišo tša go ithuta ka motšhene go tloga go prototype go ya go tšweletšo.

machineLearningPipelines.title: Diphaephe tša go ithuta ka motšhene
machineLearningPipelines.description: Tšweletšo ya AI e thoma ka diphaephe tše di tšweleditšwego tšeo di kgokaganyago data, diteko, tiišetšo le maikutlo.

modelDeploymentPatterns.title: Model Deployment Patterns
modelDeploymentPatterns.description: Deployment strategy is selected based on latency requirements, business criticality, and operational complexity.

mlopsOperatingModel.title: MLOps Operating Model
mlopsOperatingModel.description: Mekgwa ya MLOps e netefatša gore ditshepedišo tša AI di dula di tshephagala, di laolwa le go fetoga ge tšhomišo e gola.

monitoringAndReliability.title: Tlhokomelo le go botega
monitoringAndReliability.description: Observability closes the loop between model behavior and operational results.

dataAndFeatureEngineering.title: Data and Feature Engineering
dataAndFeatureEngineering.description: Versioned data ingestion, quality checks, and reusable feature definitions create a reliable foundation for model training.

modelDevelopment.title: Tlhabollo ya Mohlala
modelDevelopment.description: Diteko di latelwa ka dipeakanyo tše di tšweleditšwego, metriki ya maikemišetšo le metheo ya go bapetša ya go itiriša.

validationAndSafetyGates.title: Dikgoro tša Tšhireletšo le Tšhireletšo
validationAndSafetyGates.description: Modulasetulo wa Kgoro ya Merero ya Selegae o fetišetša dinyakišišo tša go šoma gabotse, go tia le go dira dinyakišišo pele ga ge di ka dumelelwa go lokollwa.

operationalFeedbackLoops.title: Operational Feedback Loops
operationalFeedbackLoops.description: Post-deployment telemetry informs retraining priorities, rollback decisions, and next iteration planning.

realTimeInferenceServices.title: Real-Time Inference Services
realTimeInferenceServices.description: Low-latency APIs for interactive applications with autoscaling, caching, and request-level observability.

batchAndStreamingPredictions.title: Batch and Streaming Predictions
batchAndStreamingPredictions.description: Scheduled and event-driven pipelines for high-volume scoring across analytics and operational workflows.

edgeAwareDeployment.title: Edge-Aware Deployment
edgeAwareDeployment.description: Hybrid cloud-edge serving patterns for environments require local inference and centralized model governance.

ciCdForModels.title: CI/CD for Models
ciCdForModels.description: Automated build, test, and release workflows reduce deployment risk while keeping delivery speed.

modelRegistryAndLifecycle.title: Model Registry and Lifecycle
modelRegistryAndLifecycle.description: Versioned model artifacts with promotion stages, lineage, and approval workflows improve control and traceability.

servingInfrastructure.title: Go Direla Mananeokgoparara
servingInfrastructure.description: Scalable serving layers with rollout strategies such as canary and shadow deployments support safe change management.

monitoringPillars.latencyThroughputAndCostEfficiencyTracki: Latency, throughput, and cost efficiency tracking
monitoringPillars.dataQualityRegressionAlertsAndRemediatio: Data quality regression alerts and remediation workflows
monitoringPillars.auditabilityForComplianceAndIncidentAnal: Auditability for compliance and incident analysis

cta.title: Scale Applied AI with Confidence
cta.description: Ge e le gore o beakanya diprotšeke tša AI tšeo di nyakago dipoelo tše di ka lekanywago le tlhokomelo ya lebaka le letelele, Horizon e ka thuša go hlama le go phethagatša tshepedišo ka botlalo ya bophelo bja tshepedišo.

hero.title: NLP ya maleme a mantši
hero.description: Explore practical natural language processing capabilities and how they scale into reliable, multilingual production systems.

foundations.title: Motheo wa NLP
foundations.description: Tshepedišo ya polelo ya tlhago e kopanya maswao a polelo le go ithuta ka motšhene go ntšha tlhalošo, maikemišetšo le sebopego go tšwa sengwalweng.

workbench.title: Interactive NLP Workbench
workbench.description: Use the demo to test language detection, sentiment scoring, entity extraction, and translation behaviors in real time.

productionApplications.title: How Horizon Applies NLP in Production
productionApplications.description: Bokgoni bja NLP bo kopantšwe ka gare ga mešomo ya kgwebo ka dišireletšo tša tiragatšo le metriki ya boleng bjo bo kwagalago.

reliabilityAndGovernance.title: Melawana ya go Botega le Taolo
reliabilityAndGovernance.description: Tšweletšo ya NLP e nyaka go feta boleng bja mohlala; E ithekgile ka mekgwa ye e bolokegilego ya go tsenya tirišong le netefatšo ye e tšwelago pele.

foundations.intro1: Modern NLP systems power support automation, search relevance, knowledge extraction, and multilingual collaboration. Phethagatšo ye e šomago gabotse e nyaka bobedi boleng bja mohlala le taolo ye e tiilego ya tshepedišo.
foundations.intro2: Ka Horizon, re nepiša ditshepedišo tša NLP tša mafelelo tšeo di kopanyago inference ye e tiilego le go lebelelwa, pušo le khuetšo ya tšweletšo ye e ka lekanywago.

languageDetection.title: Temogo ya Polelo
languageDetection.description: Identify language from short or long text segments to route requests into the right processing pipeline.

sentimentAnalysis.title: Tshekatsheko ya maikutlo
sentimentAnalysis.description: Extracts emotional intent and polarity for customer intelligence, support triage, and product feedback loops.

entityExtraction.title: Entity Extraction
entityExtraction.description: Detects structured entities such as names, companies, locations, and dates from unstructured text.

translation.title: Phetolelo
translation.description: E thekga tshepedišo ya mošomo wa dipolelo tše ntši ka go fetolela sengwalwa seo se tšweleditšwego ke mošomiši goba sengwalwa sa tirišo mola o boloka tikologo.

supportAndTicketIntelligence.title: Thekgo le Bohlale bja Dithekete
supportAndTicketIntelligence.description: Classify incoming requests by urgency, intent, and sentiment to speed up routing and response quality.

governedContentOperations.title: Ditiro tša diteng tše di laolwago
governedContentOperations.description: Apply policy-aware language filters and moderation checks with measurable precision and remember targets.

textDrivenBusinessInsights.title: Text-Driven Business Insights
textDrivenBusinessInsights.description: Aggregate trends from documents, reviews, and communications to inform strategy and operational decisions.

evaluationByUseCase.title: Evaluation by Use Case
evaluationByUseCase.description: Models are benchmarked against domain-specific datasets before release decisions are made.

humanInTheLoopSafeguards.title: Tšhireletšo ya batho
humanInTheLoopSafeguards.description: Diponelopele tša khuetšo ya godimo di akaretša ditsela tša go lekola, melawana ya go oketšega, le maswao a tshepo ao a bonagalago.

continuousMonitoring.title: Tlhahlo ye e tšwelago pele
continuousMonitoring.description: Drift, latency, and quality degradation are tracked continuously so retraining and rollback are proactive.

hero.title: Genetic Algorithm Simulation
hero.description: Explore evolutionary computation in an interactive environment and see how the same principles translate into production optimization systems.

scientificFoundation.title: Motheo wa Saense
scientificFoundation.description: Di-algorithms tša leabela ke mekgwa ya go kaonafatša yeo e theilwego godimo ga setšhaba yeo e hlohleleditšwego ke kgetho ya tlhago le phetogo.

interactiveEnvironment.title: Interactive Evolution Environment
interactiveEnvironment.description: Run the simulation to see fitness improve generation by generation and observe how selection pressure influences results.

productionUse.title: How Horizon Uses This in Production
productionUse.description: The same search mechanics used in this demo inform optimization pipelines deployed in operational systems.

applicationDomains.title: Wider Application Domains
applicationDomains.description: Tlhabollo ya tlhagelelo e bohlokwa kudu ka ditshepedišong tše di nago le maikemišetšo a magolo le mapheko ao a thulanago.

scientificFoundation.intro1: Sebakeng sa go nyaka tharollo e tee ka nako e tee, di-algorithms tša leabela di hlabolla setšhaba sa go fapafapana sa bonkgetheng. Moloko wo mongwe le wo mongwe o lekolwa go ya ka mošomo wa go itšhidulla le go kaonafatšwa ka go kgetha, go phatlalatša le go fetoga.
scientificFoundation.intro2: Se se dira gore di šome gabotse go mathata a maemo a godimo ao a nago le mapheko ao a sego a mothalotheto, moo mekgwa ya deterministic e ba e fokolago goba e tura kudu.

selection.title: Kgetho
selection.description: Bakgethi bao ba šomago gabotse ba na le kgonagalo ye kaone ya go phologa le go huetša moloko wo o latelago.

crossover.title: Crossover
crossover.description: Strong traits are recombined to create new candidate solutions with mixed strengths.

mutation.title: Phetogo
mutation.description: Controlled randomness introduces diversity so search does not stall around local optima.

convergence.title: Convergence
convergence.description: Mo melokong ye mentši, batho ba na le mokgwa wa go hwetša ditharollo tše di tiilego le tša boleng bja godimo.

resourceScheduling.title: Lenaneo la Methopo
resourceScheduling.description: Re diriša mekgwa ya tlhagelelo go kaonafatša peakanyo ya mapheko a mantši moo go sa kgonegego.

architectureTuning.title: Architecture Tuning
architectureTuning.description: Dipeakanyo tša mananeokgoparara di lekolwa iteratively go kaonafatša tiragatšo le go šoma gabotse ga ditshenyegelo.

continuousOptimization.title: Continuous Optimization
continuousOptimization.description: Optimization jobs run in controlled loops with telemetry feedback so systems adapt as demand profiles shift.

routeAndLogisticsPlanning.title: Route & Logistics Planning
routeAndLogisticsPlanning.description: Complex delivery and dispatch planning benefits from evolutionary search when constraints change rapidly.

modelAndHyperparameterSearch.title: Model and Hyperparameter Search
modelAndHyperparameterSearch.description: Nyakišišo ya leabela e ka hwetša dipeakanyo tša boleng bja godimo ge mafelo a maikemišetšo a le lešata e bile a se na mothalotheto.

portfolioAndAllocationProblems.title: Portfolio and Allocation Problems
portfolioAndAllocationProblems.description: Optimization under competitive goals can be framed as fitness tradeoffs across evolving candidate sets.
